expectations.text: [defect_replay][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: SDK/API visible outcomes like window title become explicit scenarios
expectations.evidence: result.md states Phase 4a contract “explicitly mandates that SDK/API-visible outcomes (example given: `setWindowTitle`, `errorHandler`) must be turned into explicit scenarios with testable, observable verification leaves” and further quotes the contract requirement that such outcomes “must each map to at least one scenario with a testable, observable verification leaf.” This directly addresses window title as an explicit scenario focus.

expectations.text: [defect_replay][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: result.md’s “What Phase 4a must produce (phase4a contract alignment)” section describes Phase 4a as “sub-category-only drafting” with required structure “central topic → subcategory → scenario → atomic action chain → observable verification leaves,” and explicitly concludes “Output aligns with primary phase: phase4a.” execution_notes.md also indicates the replay work was “Checked Phase 4a contract requirements,” i.e., focused on phase4a.
